name: Joe Bishop
abstract: Joe Bishop (November 27, 1907 – May 12, 1976) was an American jazz multi-instrumentalist and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Woody Herman
about_quotes.evidence: Joe Bishop, of course, did a masterful job of writing tunes for the band, writing arrangements for the band, and then switching over from tuba, which he played with Isham, to flugelhorn with our band.

about_quotes.speaker: Zilner T. Randolph
about_quotes.evidence: Joe Bishop was the flugelhorn man... and myself. ... most of those boys did the sweet tunes
